title: Playground Portability Hub
concept: A card-grid workspace for theme authors that puts import, save, export, ZIP, GitHub, local directory, and Blueprint bundle movement in the first viewport, with a detail drawer for the selected transfer task and supporting Site Manager sections below.
focus: light gray workspace with green status accents
saved project management and bundle visibility
flows: Import from GitHub, import a zip, run a Blueprint URL, preview WordPress PRs, preview Gutenberg PRs or branches, or start Vanilla WordPress from the portability board.
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible copy progress and saved library management.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, delete, save, and download actions.
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint bundle tools, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, path navigation, refresh, GitHub export, and zip download.
Browse featured Blueprint shortcuts and the full 43-entry gallery with category filtering.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
